findings.summary: run_canonicalize restructured from unconditional ohlcv+bbo to per-requested-schema conditionals; schema-subset requests that previously failed now succeed. Required for tbbo-only routing; two-schema behavior verified identical; no consumers outside module CLI and tests.

_tbbo_dedupe_key places raw row.get('sequence') in a sorted tuple; mixed None/int sequences at identical (root, event_ts) raise an uncaught TypeError. Loud crash, not silent corruption; real DBN decode always supplies int sequence. Suggest str() in the key.
CanonicalizeSummary.to_mapping gained tbbo_data_version/tbbo_row_count keys; no external hash/strict-key consumer exists.
_normalize_aggressor_side accepts an 'unknown' alias beyond the DBN A/B/N domain; local and harmless (maps to 'none').
